---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill or a major capability expansion for an existing one
title: "[Skill] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

Describe the skill or capability you want to add.

## Problem

What repeated task or gap would this solve?

## Scope

- New skill or update to an existing skill?
- Which repository structures or workflows should it support?

## Proposed files

List the files you expect to add or update.

## Validation idea

Describe the evals or examples that should prove the skill works.
